title: Module 8.2: ANSI E1.46 - Entertainment Laser Safety
subtitle: Master Entertainment-Specific Laser Safety Standards
description: Comprehensive coverage of ANSI E1.46 (Entertainment Technology - Laser Safety) including audience scanning requirements, MPE compliance for intentional exposure, and the unique safety protocols for laser light shows and entertainment applications.

learning_objectives.objective: Apply ANSI E1.46 requirements for intentional audience exposure to laser radiation
Design scan failure safety systems meeting E1.46 response time requirements
Calculate MPE relaxation factors for scanned beams and diffraction effects
Execute pre-show safety verification procedures per E1.46
Distinguish between supervised and unsupervised installation requirements

interactive_components.name: E146 Compliance Checker
interactive_components.description: Step-by-step compliance verification for entertainment laser setups

interactive_components.name: Scan Failure Response Calculator
interactive_components.description: Calculate required scan failure detection response times

interactive_components.name: MPE Relaxation Factor Tool
interactive_components.description: Calculate MPE relaxation for scanned and diffused beams

interactive_components.name: Installation Type Classifier
interactive_components.description: Determine supervised vs unsupervised installation requirements

interactive_components.name: Pre-Show Safety Simulator
interactive_components.description: Virtual walkthrough of pre-show safety verification

badge.name: E146 Entertainment Safety Specialist
badge.description: Mastered ANSI E1.46 entertainment laser safety standards

standards_reference: ANSI E1.46-2023 Entertainment Technology - Laser Safety
ANSI Z136.10-2022 Safe Use of Lasers in Entertainment

research_alignment.retention_strategy: Case study integration with real-world scenarios
